song.title: Lord, Keep my Heart
song.presentation: V1 C V2 C V3 C
song.lyrics:
[V1] .C Am Dm G Lord, keep my heart always true to You, .C Am Dm G Never backsliding always viewing You, . C Am Dm G A heart that is pure that sees only You, . C Am Dm G C A heart that loves You and treasures only You.
[C] .C Am Dm G Your love constrains me to give my all to You. .C Am Dm G Lord, I can’t help it; my heart is drawn to You. .C Am Dm G Oh what a privilege! I give myself to You! . C Am I love You, Lord, dearest Lord, . Dm G C I love You! I just love You!
[V2] Lord, keep my love burning brightly for You, A love never dwindling always hot for You, A love, shining brighter all the way for You, A love, so fresh like the day I first touched You.
[V3] Lord, take my life, I present it to You! If I had a thousand, I’d pour all on You! Nothing withholding, my all is for You. My life and my future, dear Lord, is all for You.
